title: Confirm dialog component with keyboard navigation and focus management
purpose: Provides a reusable confirmation dialog UI component that handles keyboard events, manages focus, and supports custom labels and actions.

steps.content: Initialize a ref for the confirm button element.
Set focus to the confirm button when the dialog opens.
Render nothing if the dialog is not open.
Handle keyboard events for escape key and command/ctrl+enter shortcuts.
Render the dialog backdrop with proper accessibility attributes.
Render the dialog content including title, message, and action buttons.
Close the dialog when the escape key is pressed.
Confirm the action when command or control key is combined with enter key.
